title: ICE40 DDR output simulation not matching oscope

features.name: ice40 sb_io ddr output primitive
features.description: Code should include an iCE40 SB_IO primitive instantiation configured for DDR output with PIN_TYPE set to 6'b110000

features.name: ddr output with 2-bit register assignment
features.description: Code should include a 2-bit register being assigned to DDR output signals D_OUT_0 and D_OUT_1 where D_OUT_0 takes the low bit and D_OUT_1 takes the high bit

features.name: output_clk driven ddr output
features.description: Code should include an OUTPUT_CLK signal driving an iCE40 DDR output primitive for double data rate signaling
